text_fr: NATIONS UNIES CONSEIL ECONOMIOUE ET SOCIAL
text_en: UNITED NATIONS ECONOMIC AND SOCIAL COUNCIL

text_fr: COMMISSION ECONOMIQUE POUR L'AJRIQUE Sixieme session Addis-Abeba, 19 fevrier - 3 mars I964
text_en: ECONOMIC COMMISSION FOR AJRICA Sixth session Addis Ababa, 19 February - 3 March I964

text_fr: Resolution 118(VI) adoptee par la Commission, a. sa 113e Beance plenlare le 2 mars 196^
text_en: Resolution 118(VI) adopted by the Commission, a.

text_fr: Constatant le besoin de consacrer plus d1 attention a. I1 analyse des programmes de protection sociale, et au developpemen.t des programmes nationaux en vue de repondre aux b.esoins de la region et des pays individuels,
text_en: Noting the need to devote more attention to the analysis of social protection programmes and to the development of national programmes in order to respond to the needs of the region and individual countries,

text_fr: fleconnaissant que la defense sooiale, efest-a-dire la prevention et le traitement des comportements irreguliers des- adultes et des jeunes, est un domaine du service social qui a recu peu d'attention,
text_en: flaunting that sooial defence, which is the prevention and treatment of ireguous behaviour of adults and young people, is an area of social service which has received little attention,

text_fr: Reconnaissant aussi la necessity d1 en.treprendre des etudes dans certains pays de la region afin de determiner l'etendue et les facteurs determinants du crime et de la delinquance, aussi bien que les mesures et les facilites existantes pour la prevention de la delinquance et pour le traitement des jeunes et des adultes delinquants,
text_en: Recognizing also the need to undertake studies in some countries of the region in order to determine the extent and determinants of crime and crime, as well as existing measures and facilities for the prevention of crime and for the treatment of young people and adult offenders,

text_fr: Tenant compte du besoin eprouve par les gouvernements africains de conseils regionaux sur la legislation moderne, les institutions et la formation du personnel de defense sociale,
text_en: Taking into account the need of African Governments for regional councils on modern legislation, institutions and training of social defence personnel,

text_fr: Rappelant la recommandation III du Cycle d1etudes sur le developpement des services de protection de la famille et de l'enfance dans le cadre des programmes de developpement communautaire (s/CN.14/79); la recommandation B du Cycle d1 etudes sur 1' urbanisation en Afrique (E/CH". I4/17O) et la recom mandation GLYPH(cmap:df00) sur la delinquance juvenile du Cycle d!etudes sur les problemes urbains (E/CK.14/241) insistent sur le besoin d1action urgente afin de resoudre le probleme de la delinquance qui resulte de 1'urbanisation rapide,
text_en: Recalling recommendation III of the Cycle of Studies on the Development of Family and Child Protection Services in Community Development Programmes (s/CN.14/79); recommendation B of the Cycle of Studies on Urbanisation in Africa (E/CH). I4/17O) and recommendation GLYPH(cmap:df00) on the juvenile delinquency of the Cycle of Studies on Urban Problems (E/CK.14/241) stress the need for urgent action to address the problem of criminality resulting from rapid urbanization,

items_en: " ^* Expresses its approval to the Executive Secretary for the programme of work in the field of social defencej

2Invites the Executive Secretary, in collaboration with member governments, the United Nations Office of Social Affairs, and management training schools, to develop training courses for staff in charge of criminal institutions and juvenile delinquency in order to familiarize him with modern practices-sj

4. Invites the Secretary to make available to the countries of the region, at their request, and in cooperation with the Technical Assistance Office and the Institutes of the Nations, Technical Advisers in Social Defence.
